routes.title: SegmentationAPI | SAM 3 API-as-a-Service
routes.description: Production-grade API platform for Meta's Segment Anything Model 3. Fast masks, vector output, and enterprise-ready reliability.

routes.title: SegmentationAPI Pricing | SAM 3 API
routes.description: Simple token pricing for SegmentationAPI's SAM 3 API: 1 token per processed image or video frame, with each token costing $0.02.

routes.description: Product notes, implementation guides, and segmentation engineering articles from SegmentationAPI.

routes.title: Build a natural-language background remover in 100 lines | SegmentationAPI Blog
routes.description: A step-by-step guide to building a background remover you control with plain English using SAM 3 text prompts. Full code included.

routes.description: A practical checklist for turning prompt-based segmentation into a reliable product workflow.

routes.title: Documentation | SegmentationAPI
routes.description: Complete API reference for SegmentationAPI — upload media, create segmentation jobs, and retrieve results with SAM 3.

routes.description: API key authentication, required headers, and rate limits for SegmentationAPI endpoints.

routes.title: Jobs | SegmentationAPI Docs
routes.description: Create async image and video segmentation jobs, list job history, and retrieve per-item results.

routes.title: Results | SegmentationAPI Docs
routes.description: Request a results archive, poll until it is ready, and read output_manifest.json to retrieve image and video segmentation masks.
